rights.creator: ThreeNative maintainers
rights.permission: First-party synthetic fixture and concept reference created for repository verification; redistribution and modification permitted.
rights.independence: The manual reference was drawn from the written portable-radio concept and was not copied from a runtime render.
rights.limitations: This evidence proves a bounded stylized-object workflow, not photographic reconstruction or character/animation support.

manualCompositionReview.scope: Concept-level composition and readable portable-radio identity only; this is not pixel parity or native visual parity evidence.
manualCompositionReview.observations: The accepted web render has the reviewed enclosure, speaker, material separation, and antenna socket. The independent concept includes an orange antenna/button treatment that the factory omits; that difference is accepted only for this bounded stylized fixture.
manualCompositionReview.previewHelpers: The cyan bounds panel, orange one-metre ruler, floor wedge, and grid in runtime captures are model-test helpers, not model geometry.

definitionOfDone: The reviewed radio matches the reference.

lightingFromPhoto: fill light with filmic tone mapping

visualEvidence.notes: Actual web render compared with the first-party synthetic review source; preview helpers are labeled in the comparison image.
visualEvidence.aiVisionNotes: Accepted for bounded stylized-radio identity only; not pixel or native parity.
